name: Web Search (Exa)
description: Web search, content extraction, and similar page discovery powered by Exa AI. Provides real-time internet access for agents.
author: Evonic

variables.name: exa_api_key
variables.label: Exa API Key
variables.description: Optional Exa API key for higher rate limits. Free tier works without a key. Get one at https://exa.ai

variables.name: max_results
variables.label: Default Max Results
variables.description: Default number of search results to return (1-50).
